overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The journey begins in a narrow trash-filled alley and progresses through dense city streets with towering digital billboards, elevated highways, and heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with debris and metal scaffolding

events.description: approaching the end of the narrow alley toward the open street exit

agents.ego_description: walking through a cluttered back alley filled with trash bags and debris toward the street exit

entered.detail: rusted metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks stacked alongside the right wall
scattered garbage bags and debris littering the concrete floor of the alley
discarded cardboard box and wooden crate against the left concrete wall
glowing digital advertisement screens visible at the far end of the alley opening
tall weathered concrete walls enclosing the narrow passage on both sides

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alleyway with concrete walls and scattered debris. The camera moves forward past trash bags and metal scaffolding on the right, heading toward a bright exit where digital billboards are visible in the distance. The space is dimly lit and completely empty of people.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition alley with commercial signage and merchandise stalls

events.description: emerging from deep shadow into direct sunlight streaming through the alley exit
passing a standing pedestrian near wooden crates on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing alley and passing a pedestrian standing near merchandise stalls on the right

notable_agents.action: standing near wooden crates and shelves wearing distinctive yellow boots and dark clothing

entered.detail: illuminated digital sign reading 'NEW JOB GET ANSWERS' with cyan text on dark background
human figure standing near storage shelves on the right side of the passage
towering futuristic skyscrapers visible at the end of the alley opening

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the latter half of the alley where sunlight begins to penetrate. A pedestrian in yellow boots stands near wooden stalls on the right. Digital billboards become more prominent on the walls, and the towering city buildings become visible at the alley's end as the space opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with elevated highway and massive digital advertising

events.description: exiting narrow alley onto wide city street with multi-lane traffic and towering billboards
navigating through pedestrian crosswalk as vehicles pass on the left and right

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the main street and crossing through moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic while turning left to follow the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk
person in red jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure spanning across the street ahead
cluster of giant digital advertisement screens covering the building facades
row of parked futuristic vehicles along the left curb
suspended traffic signals showing red light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up dramatically as the camera exits the alley onto a bustling city street. Massive digital billboards cover the buildings to the left, while an elevated highway looms ahead. The camera navigates through pedestrians and past parked cars, crossing the street as traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon sidewalk beneath elevated highway with dense neon advertising

events.description: entering deep shadow cast by overhead highway structure blocking the sun
slight turn to the right to follow the curving sidewalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, following the curve of the street while passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in red hoodie walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete underside of the elevated highway casting deep shadows on the street below
bright cyan and pink neon signs advertising various products on the right building
tall modern street lamps with orange glowing lights lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a sidewalk now covered by the massive elevated highway above, creating an urban canyon effect. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadow and artificial neon glow. Pedestrians walk ahead on the left, while futuristic cars pass by on the right. Digital billboards now appear on the right side as the street curves.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered intersection beneath multi-level highway with parking structure

events.description: entering fully covered area under highway overpass with reduced natural light and increased artificial lighting
pausing at intersection as multiple vehicles including a silver sedan and blue sports car navigate the crossing

agents.ego_description: slowing down and pausing at the intersection under the overpass to observe and wait for traffic to clear

notable_agents.action: silver sedan with headlights on driving through the intersection
blue sports car waiting at the intersection with brake lights illuminated

entered.detail: large concrete parking garage with multiple visible levels and open facades
massive digital screen displaying an advertisement for a futuristic vehicle
thick concrete columns supporting the highway structure above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place in a covered intersection beneath the highway overpass, dominated by a multi-level parking structure. The camera slows to a stop near the curb as dense traffic flows through the intersection, including a silver sedan and blue sports car. Large digital billboards illuminate the scene with artificial light, while the massive concrete support pillars of the highway frame the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, enclosed alleyway into the overwhelming scale of a bustling futuristic metropolis. It begins in a dimly lit concrete corridor filled with debris and scaffolding, moving forward toward a bright exit where digital billboards first appear in the distance. As the camera reaches the end of the alley, the space opens up dramatically into a sunlit city street crowded with pedestrians, parked cars, and massive glowing advertisements. The scene then shifts into an urban canyon as the camera moves beneath a looming elevated highway, where the lighting transitions from natural sunlight to a mix of deep shadows and artificial neon glow. Finally, the movement slows to a stop at a covered intersection dominated by concrete support pillars and a multi-level parking structure, while dense traffic and towering digital screens illuminate the surrounding environment.
